understanding.goal_understanding: Finish the current level (BP35) by navigating the character to the goal gem tile marked '+', avoiding spikes that instantly end the run, using at most 2 attempts and 50 turns per attempt.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: On each turn you choose a horizontal move (MOVE_LEFT/MOVE_RIGHT) or CLICK/UNDO. After any horizontal move, gravity automatically carries the character in the current gravity direction until they land on a solid/support tile, hit a hazard (spikes 'u'/'v' which cause immediate failure), or reach the goal '+'. CLICK targets a specific grid coordinate to remove a breakable/clickable block (e.g., 'x') to open or alter fall paths and does not move the character; UNDO reverts the previous action. Efficient play relies on using the state’s landing previews (left_landing/right_landing and corridor_scan) to choose moves that create passages to new vertical sections and to avoid landing on hazards.
